skill.displayName: AI-native Bitcoin payments. Buy, sell, send, and request Bitcoin directly through any existing messenger app (Telegram, WhatsApp, Signal, Email) or create your own email accounts to start messaging via email.
skill.summary: Payment rails between humans and AI agents via BitChat. Telegram-first.

latestVersion.changelog:
- Added a first-run onboarding procedure: the skill now automatically creates a Bit-Chat account (if needed), obtains your Lightning address, and forwards it to your human operator.
- Clarified the default first action is to retrieve and deliver the Lightning address upon skill installation.
- Provided a step-by-step initial setup process to improve user experience and reduce manual steps.
- Included guidance on saving the Lightning address for future use.
